# Why Your Content Fails to Rank in Google (#1 Reason)

- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Have you ever wondered why your content isn’t ranking well
despite updating it regularly?

Of course, there could be many reasons.

In many cases, it’s because of your backlink profile 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..0OBeMPcdGupiUo7XZwvr9sMztxE_b2U21iRyBfyC078 )
.

Unfortunately, many users don't even know they can track backlink
profiles.

All you need is to use one of these backlink checker tools listed
below.

-------------------------------------
Earn More Link Juice – Ultimate Guide
-------------------------------------

Now you know backlinks can make or break your website’s SEO.
Building backlinks can take time.

But there is an EASY alternative way to increase link juice!

By interlinking your own articles.

Here’s EVERYTHING you need to know about internal linking
